const BASE_URL="https://speech-to-text-app-production-9797.up.railway.app";const getHeaders=function(){let isFormData=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:false;const token=localStorage.getItem("token");const headers={};if(!isFormData)headers["Content-Type"]="application/json";if(token)headers["Authorization"]="Bearer ".concat(token);return headers;};const handleResponse=async res=>{const contentType=res.headers.get("content-type")||"";const isJson=contentType.includes("application/json");const safeJson=async()=>{// Some backends return 204/empty body; res.json() would throw "unexpected end of JSON".
const text=await res.text();if(!text)return{};try{return JSON.parse(text);}catch(_unused){return{};}};const safeText=async()=>{try{return await res.text();}catch(_unused2){return"";}};if(!res.ok){if(isJson){const err=await safeJson();throw new Error(err.message||"HTTP ".concat(res.status));}const msg=await safeText();throw new Error(msg||"HTTP ".concat(res.status));}if(!isJson){// For endpoints that return no JSON (or empty body), return empty object.
await safeText();return{};}return safeJson();};// Auth
export const register=data=>fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/api/auth/register"),{method:"POST",headers:getHeaders(),body:JSON.stringify(data)}).then(handleResponse);export const login=data=>fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/api/auth/login"),{method:"POST",headers:getHeaders(),body:JSON.stringify(data)}).then(handleResponse);// Speech
export const uploadAudio=formData=>fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/api/speech/upload"),{method:"POST",headers:getHeaders(true),body:formData}).then(handleResponse);export const transcribeAudio=formData=>fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/api/speech/transcribe"),{method:"POST",headers:getHeaders(true),body:formData}).then(handleResponse);export const getHistory=()=>fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/api/speech/history"),{headers:getHeaders()}).then(handleResponse);export const getTranscript=id=>fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/api/speech/").concat(id),{headers:getHeaders()}).then(handleResponse);
